THEVALKYRIE-STRIKE_VALKYRIE.title: Strike
THEVALKYRIE-DEFEND_VALKYRIE.title: Defend
THEVALKYRIE-MAKE_IT_BLEED.title: Make it Bleed
THEVALKYRIE-SHIELD_OF_FAITH.title: Shield of Faith
THEVALKYRIE-CUT_APART.title: Cut Apart
THEVALKYRIE-DIVINE_INSPIRATION.title: Divine Inspiration
THEVALKYRIE-STRENUOUS_PARRY.title: Strenuous Parry
THEVALKYRIE-BALANCED_STRIKE.title: Balanced Strike
THEVALKYRIE-BALANCED_STRIKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Prevent the next {BalancedStrikePower:diff()} times you would [gold]Overexert[/gold] this turn.
THEVALKYRIE-SANCTUARY.title: Sanctuary
THEVALKYRIE-SONG_OF_BATTLE.title: Song of Battle
THEVALKYRIE-SHRIEK.title: Shriek
THEVALKYRIE-SHRIEK.description: Deal damage equal to your [gold]Overexertion[/gold].{InCombat:\n(Deals {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage)|}
THEVALKYRIE-TENDERIZE.title: Tenderize
THEVALKYRIE-JOIN_THE_FRAY.title: Join the Fray
THEVALKYRIE-JUMP_AHEAD.title: Jump Ahead
THEVALKYRIE-CONFUSE.title: Confuse
THEVALKYRIE-QUICK_PUNCH.title: Quick Punch
THEVALKYRIE-CHURCH_HYMN.title: Church Hymn
THEVALKYRIE-CHURCH_HYMN.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Add a [gold]Smite[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].\n|}At the start of your turn, [gold]Overexert[/gold] 3 and add a [gold]Smite[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
THEVALKYRIE-BULLRUSH.title: Bullrush
THEVALKYRIE-BULLRUSH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If this didn't kill an enemy, [gold]Overexert[/gold] {OverexertionPower:diff()}.
THEVALKYRIE-PRELUDE.title: Prelude
THEVALKYRIE-PRELUDE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Upgrade[/gold] {Cards:diff()} random cards in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
THEVALKYRIE-CHARGING_TARGE.title: Charging Targe
THEVALKYRIE-CHARGING_TARGE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Gain {ArmorPower:diff()} [gold]Armor[/gold] this turn.
THEVALKYRIE-DEEP_BREATH.title: Deep Breath
THEVALKYRIE-BIRDBRAIN.title: Birdbrain
THEVALKYRIE-BIRDBRAIN.description:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] 1 card.
Add a random {IfUpgraded:show:[gold]Upgraded[/gold] }card into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. It costs 1 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} less this turn.
THEVALKYRIE-PREPARE_SERMON.title: Prepare Sermon
THEVALKYRIE-PREPARE_SERMON.description: If you have no [gold]Smites[/gold] in your [gold]Hand[/gold], add {Quantity:diff()} [gold]Smites[/gold] into your hand.
THEVALKYRIE-SHARPEN.title: Sharpen
THEVALKYRIE-SHARPEN.description:
Choose an Attack in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] to [gold]Bless[/gold] with [purple]Sanguine {Bless:diff()}[/purple].
Replace the current enchantment if necessary.
THEVALKYRIE-SHARPEN.selectionScreenPromp: Choose an attack to add, improve or replace the enchantment with [purple]Sanguine {Bless:diff()}[/purple].
THEVALKYRIE-TAKE_RISKS.title: Take Risks
THEVALKYRIE-BURN_BRIGHT.title: Burn Bright
THEVALKYRIE-BURN_BRIGHT.description:
Lose {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
Lose {DexterityPower:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
Gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} at the start of each turn.
THEVALKYRIE-RAIN_OF_FEATHERS.title: Rain of Feathers
THEVALKYRIE-RAIN_OF_FEATHERS.description: Apply {BleedPower:diff()} [gold]Bleed[/gold] and deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies {Hits:diff()} times.
THEVALKYRIE-CRUSADE.title: Crusade
THEVALKYRIE-CRUSADE.description: Your [gold]Smites[/gold] deal {CrusadeAttackPower:diff()} additional damage and have {CrusadeBlockPower:diff()} additional [gold]Block[/gold].
THEVALKYRIE-CHOP_UP.title: Chop Up
THEVALKYRIE-SONG_OF_PROTECTION.title: Song of Protection
THEVALKYRIE-CAW_CAW.title: CAW CAW!
THEVALKYRIE-GO_FOR_THE_KILL.title: Go for the Kill
THEVALKYRIE-GO_FOR_THE_KILL.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply [gold]Bleed[/gold] equal to unblocked damage dealt.
THEVALKYRIE-RUSTED_DAGGER.title: Rusted Dagger
THEVALKYRIE-RUSTED_DAGGER.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Once per fight, permanently increase this card's damage by {Increase:diff()}.
THEVALKYRIE-HEAVY_ARMOR.title: Heavy Armor
THEVALKYRIE-RAZOR_WINGS.title: Razor Wings
THEVALKYRIE-RAZOR_WINGS.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Whenever you are attacked this turn, apply {BleedPower:diff()} [gold]Bleed[/gold] back.
THEVALKYRIE-SONG_OF_DESTRUCTION.title: Song of Destruction
THEVALKYRIE-DIG_YOUR_HEELS_IN.title: Dig Your Heels In
THEVALKYRIE-SONG_OF_SAFETY.title: Song of Safety
THEVALKYRIE-SONG_OF_SAFETY.description:
Gain {ArmorPower:diff()} [gold]Armor[/gold] this turn.
[gold]Overexert[/gold] {OverexertionPower:diff()}.
Add {Quantity:diff()} [purple]Aegis {Aegis:diff()}[/purple] [gold]Smites[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
THEVALKYRIE-PULL_A_MUSCLE.title: Pull a Muscle
THEVALKYRIE-PULL_A_MUSCLE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
For the rest of this combat, [gold]Overexert[/gold] {OverexertionPower:diff()} at the start of each turn.
THEVALKYRIE-EAGLE_DIVE.title: Eagle Dive
THEVALKYRIE-EAGLE_DIVE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Costs 1 less {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} for every 5 [gold]Overexertion[/gold] you have.
THEVALKYRIE-CRESCENDO_STRIKE.title: Crescendo Strike
THEVALKYRIE-CRESCENDO_STRIKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Whenever you draw this card, [gold]Bless[/gold] it{IfUpgraded:show: twice|}.
THEVALKYRIE-LOSE_YOURSELF.title: Lose Yourself
THEVALKYRIE-LOSE_YOURSELF.description:
If you have 10 or more [gold]Overexertion[/gold], Apply {BleedPower:diff()} [gold]Bleed[/gold].
Otherwise, [gold]Overexert[/gold] {OverexertionPower:diff()}.
THEVALKYRIE-POLISH.title: Polish
THEVALKYRIE-BRIMMING.title: Brimming
THEVALKYRIE-BRIMMING.description: The first time each turn you reach 10 cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold], gain {BrimmingPower:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
THEVALKYRIE-REINFORCE.title: Reinforce
THEVALKYRIE-REINFORCE.description:
Choose a Skill in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] to [gold]Bless[/gold] with [purple]Aegis {Bless:diff()}[/purple].
Replace the current enchantment if necessary.
THEVALKYRIE-REINFORCE.selectionScreenPro: Choose an attack to add, improve or replace the enchantment with [purple]Aegis {Bless:diff()}[/purple].
THEVALKYRIE-BUCKLER_FEINT.title: Buckler Feint
THEVALKYRIE-CRUSH_THEIR_SPIRITS.title: Crush Their Spirits
THEVALKYRIE-CRUSH_THEIR_SPIRITS.descript:
{IfUpgraded:show: Apply 1 [gold]Weak[/gold] to ALL enemies.
|}At the end of your turn, deal damage to ALL enemies equal to your [gold]Armor[/gold].
THEVALKYRIE-CLOSE_QUARTERS_COMBAT.title: Close and Personal
THEVALKYRIE-CLOSE_QUARTERS_COMBAT.descri:
Gain double [gold]Overexert[/gold].
At the start of your turn, Apply 1 [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to {IfUpgraded:show:ALL enemies|a random enemy}.
THEVALKYRIE-SHINING_STAR.title: Shining Star
THEVALKYRIE-SHINING_STAR.description: At the start of your turn, if you took no unblocked damage last turn, gain {ShiningStarPower:diff()} [gold]Vigor[/gold].
THEVALKYRIE-HOPE_IN_DESPAIR.title: Find Hope in Despair
THEVALKYRIE-HOPE_IN_DESPAIR.description:
If you have {OverexertionThreshold:diff()} or more [gold]Overexertion[/gold],
gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold], and your next card is played an extra time.
THEVALKYRIE-PRESS_YOUR_ADVANTAGE.title: Press Your Advantage
THEVALKYRIE-PRESS_YOUR_ADVANTAGE.descrip:
Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold].
Gain {DisplayBlockPerCard:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] for each other card in your [gold]Hand[/gold].{InCombat:\n(Gain {CalculatedBlock:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold])|}
THEVALKYRIE-WARNING_STRIKE.title: Warning Strike
THEVALKYRIE-HYPERFOCUS.title: Hyperfocus
THEVALKYRIE-HYPERFOCUS.description:
Choose a card in your [gold]Hand[/gold] and add [gold]Retain[/gold] to it.
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] all cards without [gold]Retain[/gold].
THEVALKYRIE-HYPERFOCUS.selectionScreenPr: Choose a card to add [gold]Retain[/gold] to. [gold]Exhaust[/gold] all cards without [gold]Retain[/gold].
THEVALKYRIE-TUNE_UP.title: Tune Up
THEVALKYRIE-TUNE_UP.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
The next [gold]Retain[/gold] card you play costs 0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
THEVALKYRIE-STUDY.title: Study
THEVALKYRIE-RISING_PUNCH.title: Rising Punch
THEVALKYRIE-OVERPREPARE.title: Overprepare
THEVALKYRIE-OVERPREPARE.description:
Put a card from your [gold]Hand[/gold] at the bottom of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
When you draw it, apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to all enemies and gain {VigorPower:diff()} [gold]Vigor[/gold].
THEVALKYRIE-OVERPREPARE.selectionScreenP: Choose a card to put at the bottom of your Draw Pile.
THEVALKYRIE-ICARUS_COMPLEX.title: Icarus Complex
THEVALKYRIE-ICARUS_COMPLEX.description: Your effects gain and give {IcarusComplexPower:diff()}% more [gold]Vigor[/gold].
THEVALKYRIE-TELEGRAPHED_SMASH.title: Telegraphed Smash
THEVALKYRIE-TELEGRAPHED_SMASH.descriptio:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
Deals {PerCardDamage:diff()} additional damage for each other card in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
THEVALKYRIE-EAGER_JAB.title: Eager Jab
THEVALKYRIE-EAGER_JAB.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If you have [gold]Vigor[/gold], hits twice.
THEVALKYRIE-ANGEL_FORM.title: Angel Form
THEVALKYRIE-ANGEL_FORM.description:
At the start of your turn, gain {AngelFormPower:diff()} [gold]Armor[/gold].
Your [gold]Smites[/gold]'s [gold]Retain[/gold] is replaced with [gold]Ethereal[/gold].
THEVALKYRIE-DEEPEST_CUTS.title: Deepest Cuts
THEVALKYRIE-DEEPEST_CUTS.description: Whenever you apply [gold]Bleed[/gold], apply an additional {DeepestCutsPower:diff()} [gold]Bleed[/gold].
THEVALKYRIE-SONG_OF_DIVINITY.title: Song of Divinity
THEVALKYRIE-CACOPHONY.title: Cacophony
THEVALKYRIE-CACOPHONY.description: Deal damage equal to your [gold]Overexertion[/gold] to ALL enemies, then lose all your [gold]Overexertion[/gold].{InCombat:\n(Deals {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage)|}
THEVALKYRIE-HAEMORRHAGE.title: Haemorrhage
THEVALKYRIE-PERFECT_YOUR_STANCE.title: Perfect Your Stance
THEVALKYRIE-PERFECT_YOUR_STANCE.descript:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
{IfUpgraded:show:Gain |If this dealt unblocked damage, gain }{ArmorPower:diff()} [gold]Armor[/gold].
THEVALKYRIE-REQUIEM.title: Requiem
THEVALKYRIE-REQUIEM.description: Play every [gold]Smite[/gold] in your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold] on the enemy.{InCombat:\n(Plays {CalculatedSmites:diff()} [gold]{CalculatedSmites:plural:Smite|Smites}[/gold], including {CalculatedEnchantedSmites:diff()} [purple]Enchanted[/purple].)|}
THEVALKYRIE-INQUISITION.title: Inquisition
THEVALKYRIE-INQUISITION.description: Whenever you create a [gold]Smite[/gold], [gold]Upgrade[/gold]{IfUpgraded:show: and [gold]Bless[/gold]|} it.
THEVALKYRIE-DESPERATE_HOUR.title: Desperate Hour
THEVALKYRIE-DESPERATE_HOUR.description:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] your [gold]Hand[/gold].
Add 1 [gold]Blessed[/gold] [gold]Smite[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold] for each card [gold]Exhausted[/gold].
THEVALKYRIE-SPIKED_PAULDRONS.title: Spiked Pauldrons
THEVALKYRIE-ZEAL.title: Zeal
THEVALKYRIE-STRENGTH_IN_HARDSHIP.title: Strength From Hardship
THEVALKYRIE-STRENGTH_IN_HARDSHIP.descrip: Whenever you [gold]Overexert[/gold], gain {StrengthInHardshipPower:diff()} [gold]Armor[/gold] for one turn.
THEVALKYRIE-PLUMED_WISH.title: Plumed Wish
THEVALKYRIE-PLUMED_WISH.description:
Put a card from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] or your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
[gold]Overexert[/gold] {OverexertionPower:diff()}.
THEVALKYRIE-PLUMED_WISH.selectionScreenP: Choose a card to put into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. (Draw Pile is sorted first)
THEVALKYRIE-BURST_OF_POWER.title: Burst of Power
THEVALKYRIE-WRITTEN_IN_BLOOD.title: Written in Blood
THEVALKYRIE-WRITTEN_IN_BLOOD.description:
Apply {BleedPower:diff()} [gold]Bleed[/gold].
If you win this fight without taking any damage, permanently [gold]Bless[/gold] a card in your deck.
THEVALKYRIE-SANCTIFY.title: Sanctify
THEVALKYRIE-SANCTIFY.description:
Choose a non-Power card in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] to [gold]Bless[/gold] with [purple]Refrain {Bless:diff()}[/purple].
Replace the current enchantment if necessary.
THEVALKYRIE-SANCTIFY.selectionScreenProm: Choose a non-Power card to [gold]Bless[/gold] with [purple]Refrain[/purple] {Bless:diff()}[/purple].
THEVALKYRIE-TERRITORIAL_INSTINCTS.title: Abnormal Instincts
THEVALKYRIE-TERRITORIAL_INSTINCTS.descri: At the start of your turn, [gold]Transform[/gold] a non-Byrd card in your [gold]Hand[/gold] into {IfUpgraded:show:an [gold]Upgraded[/gold]|a} [gold]Byrd Card[/gold], and gain 1 [gold]Byrd Strength[/gold].
THEVALKYRIE-MUSICAL_BRIDGE.title: Musical Bridge
THEVALKYRIE-DEATH_WALTZ.title: Death Waltz
THEVALKYRIE-DEATH_WALTZ.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
[gold]Overexert[/gold] {OverexertionPower:diff()}.
If you have at least as much [gold]Overexertion[/gold] as HP, [red]Die[/red].
Return this card to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
THEVALKYRIE-BOON.title: Boon
THEVALKYRIE-BOON.description: At the start of your turn, [gold]Bless[/gold] {BoonPower:diff()} random {BoonPower:plural:card|cards} in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
THEVALKYRIE-TRUE_HEROISM.title: True Heroism
THEVALKYRIE-TRUE_HEROISM.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Gain {ArmorPower:diff()} [gold]Armor[/gold] this turn.
[gold]Overexert[/gold] {OverexertionPower:diff()}.
THEVALKYRIE-WEIGHT_OF_RESPONSIBILITY.des:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
Deals {DisplayExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage for ALL your [purple]Enchanted[/purple] cards.
THEVALKYRIE-HEAVY_FLAIL.title: Heavy Flail
THEVALKYRIE-HEAVY_FLAIL.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
Deals {DisplayExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage for each [gold]Armor[/gold] on yourself.
THEVALKYRIE-DOMINION.title: Dominion
THEVALKYRIE-DOMINION.description: Whenever you [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card, deal {DominionPower:diff()} damage to a random enemy.
THEVALKYRIE-SMITE.title: Smite
THEVALKYRIE-MAKE_IT_DIE.title: Make it Die
THEVALKYRIE-EXSANGUINATING_FORCE.title: Exsanguinating Force
THEVALKYRIE-EXSANGUINATING_FORCE.descrip: At the start of your turn, apply {BleedPower:diff()} [gold]Bleed[/gold] to ALL enemies.
THEVALKYRIE-HALLOWED_AURA.title: Hallowed Aura
THEVALKYRIE-JOIN_THE_CHOIR.title: Inspire the Choir
THEVALKYRIE-JOIN_THE_CHOIR.description:
[gold]Bless[/gold] one random card in each of your allies' [gold]Hands[/gold] with [purple]Refrain 1[/purple].
This card costs 1 more {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} for each time it was played this combat.
THEVALKYRIE-ROUSING_SOLO.title: Rousing Solo
THEVALKYRIE-ROUSING_SOLO.description:
All your allies draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards} and gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
You [gold]Overexert[/gold] {OverexertionPower:diff()}.
THEVALKYRIE-BLUNDERBUSS.title: Blunderbuss
THEVALKYRIE-BLUNDERBUSS.description: Whenever another player attacks an enemy, play a [gold]Smite[/gold] against the same target.
THEVALKYRIE-GUIDANCE.title: Guidance
THEVALKYRIE-MAESTRO_SLICE.title: Maestro Slice (deprecated)
THEVALKYRIE-MAESTRO_SLICE.description:
Apply {BleedPower:diff()} [gold]Bleed[/gold].
Gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to the [gold]Bleed[/gold] on this enemy.
THEVALKYRIE-SECOND_WIND.title: Second Wind (deprecated)
THEVALKYRIE-SECOND_WIND.description: At the end of your turn, lose {SecondWindPower:diff()} [gold]Overexertion[/gold].
THEVALKYRIE-SWOOP.title: Swoop (deprecated)
THEVALKYRIE-SWOOP.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Transform this card into [gold]{IfUpgraded:show: Byrd Swoop+|Byrd Swoop}[/gold]. It keeps its current enchantment.
THEVALKYRIE-BIRD_FIST.title: Bird Fist (deprecated)
THEVALKYRIE-BIRD_FIST.description:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] ALL of your Skills.
You take half damage and no longer [gold]Overexert[/gold].
